violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Beef, Pork removed from original container without date marking.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed grease debris hanging from vents. Need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls and ceiling needed to be cleaned more often.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Food service manager's certificate has expired. Facility must have a certified food manager.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Pasta salad and potato salads were found in the walk-in cooler expired. Expired foods should be discarded.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
